generated_oml:
// Sensors and Produced Data
instance MotorControllerCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controller output current sensor on the 100A rotary axis permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorEncoderSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder signal sensor capturing encoder counts at 10 kHz."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderSignalDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxEncoderSignalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder signal sensor measuring gear transmission rotation at 5 kHz."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderSignalDataTransmitted
]
instance CNCPositionVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CNC controller position/velocity data stream received via MQTT on the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CNCPositionVelocityDataTransmitted
]
instance DerivedTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived torque sensor representing torque computed from motor current and encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
]
instance DerivedAccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration sensor representing acceleration computed from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted
]
instance SpeedLimitEventSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed limit event sensor detecting excursions beyond the defined axis speed limits."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedLimitEventDataTransmitted
]
instance SafetyCellEventSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Safety cell event sensor capturing safety‑cell constrained events transmitted by the CNC controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SafetyCellEventDataTransmitted
]

// Data Transmitted
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorControllerCurrentSensor
]
instance MotorEncoderSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSignalSensor
]
instance GearboxEncoderSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSignalSensor
]
instance CNCPositionVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CNCPositionVelocitySensor
]
instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedTorqueSensor
]
instance DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedAccelerationSensor
]
instance SpeedLimitEventDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedLimitEventSensor
]
instance SafetyCellEventDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SafetyCellEventSensor
]

// Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor controller output current sampled at 1 kHz."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]
instance MotorEncoderSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor encoder count data sampled at 10 kHz."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]
instance GearboxEncoderSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder count data sampled at 5 kHz."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]
instance CNCPositionVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position and velocity data streamed from the CNC controller via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CNCPositionVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]
instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque data computed from current and encoder signals."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]
instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration data computed from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]
instance SpeedLimitEventData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Event data indicating speed limit violations transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedLimitEventDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]
instance SafetyCellEventData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Event data indicating safety‑cell constraints triggered by CNC controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SafetyCellEventDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB® Simulink® environment used for running friction and dynamics simulations."
    DTDFVocab:enables WhiteBoxFrictionModelIDService, BlackBoxFrictionModelIDService, SimulationComparisonService
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool providing block diagrams and modelling of the motor, gearbox, and axis twins."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationComparisonService
]
instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for packaging DT data and metadata for asset management."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPackagingService
]
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker enabling real‑time data transfer from CNC controller."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreamingService
]
instance DashboardFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard framework (Grafana) enabling visualization of live data and insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboardService, OperatorDecisionSupportVisualizationService
]

// Models
instance MotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor electrical and mechanical dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance GearboxDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox kinematic and dynamic behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model embodied in Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model developed in Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard displaying live sensor data and model outputs via Grafana."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionBehaviorChangeInsight, MotorTorqueProfileImprovementInsight
]
instance WhiteBoxFrictionModelIDService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous white‑box friction model identification using analytical models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionBehaviorChangeInsight
]
instance BlackBoxFrictionModelIDService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous black‑box data‑driven friction model identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionBehaviorChangeInsight
]
instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured sensor data with simulated motor/gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelSelectionInsight
]
instance OperatorDecisionSupportVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of derived insights to support operator decision making."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorTorqueProfileImprovementInsight
]
instance DataPackagingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Packages DT data into Asset Administration Shell for archival."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataPackagingCompletedInsight
]
instance RealTimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates real‑time data streaming over MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataStreamingStatusInsight
]

// Insights
instance FrictionBehaviorChangeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of changes in friction behavior based on model identification results."
]
instance MotorTorqueProfileImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improvement of motor torque profile suggested for enhanced machining accuracy."
]
instance ModelSelectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation for selecting the most appropriate friction model."
]
instance DataPackagingCompletedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation that data has been packaged into Asset Administration Shell."
]
instance RealTimeDataStreamingStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of the real‑time data streaming service."
]

// Actions
instance ControllerTuningRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation to adjust controller PID parameters for improved torque regulation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EquipmentMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Schedule maintenance of gearbox bearings based on wear indicators."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ModelSelectionDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decision to select between Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, or LuGre friction model."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance UpdateMotorTorqueProfileAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update motor torque profile in simulation models for higher machining accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Component Twins
instance MotorTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor twin representing the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the first rotary axis."
]
instance GearboxTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox twin representing the cycloidal gearbox of the first rotary axis."
]
instance SystemTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "System twin representing the overall dynamics of the first rotary axis."
]

// Environment
instance FirstRotaryAxisTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorTwinComponent, GearboxTwinComponent, SystemTwinComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow consumes live data streams and updates its models in real time at the native sensor sampling rates; simulation runs synchronized with the data stream, providing near‑real‑time friction estimates. Exact sampling frequencies are not specified in the document but the system operates continuously during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated set of components: the asset (robot first axis), engineering model, data‑calculation models, processing unit that consumes sensor traces and produces simulated outputs, and a visualization dashboard presenting the data trace and model results."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT includes design/ideal models (engineering models of motor and gearbox), manufacturing representations (physical sensor data), and operative models (real‑time data during machining); it spans the operational stage of the robot."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Strict traceability of each data point back to its source, comparison of measured and simulated data, continuous validation by real‑time mismatch monitoring, and inclusion of both analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) models to balance fidelity and adaptability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live sensor data are transmitted to the digital shadow via the MQTT protocol. Asset metadata and model metadata are managed within the Asset Administration Shell (AAS). No bidirectional network communication from the twin to the robot is specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for modeling, Asset Administration Shells for data interchange, and reference to digital shadow reference model per Kritzinger et al. as a standard architecture."
]
